user.title: PitPat WalkingPad
user.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your PitPat WalkingPad. You can find it in the PitPat app or by scanning for BLE devices.

confirm.title: PitPat WalkingPad found
confirm.description: Found **{name}** ({address}). Do you want to add it?

error.cannot_connect: Device not found. Make sure the WalkingPad is powered on and in Bluetooth range.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.
